description: Style NoteGlamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. A classic dress with styling details to spurce up the entire look, this one is definitely one of the must haves. Pair it with high heeled black closed pump shoes and accesorise subtly for an elegant look. Product DetailsNavy blue dress with cross- over neckline, sleeveless, tucks on the front, fabric tie- up detail on the waist and a zipper closure at the backMaterial and Care100% viscose/rayonMachine wash coldDry away from direct sunlightWash with like coloursIron back to shapeSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 8
